title: pagiantha oligantha
intro: Pagiantha oligantha, also known as the 'fragrant pagiantha', is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of pagiantha oligantha include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of pagiantha oligantha can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
